series_metadata.series_description: Memos from Director, Deputy Director, or other senior staff that set forth office policies or procedures.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Microform: Continually maintain microfilm in LSC Library ; Electronic: Beginning with records 2002, during fifth year convert tif images.
